description: Direct VT viewing geometry, side view: inspector eye with cornea pinned at the worst-case-allowed corner (exactly 600 mm from the surface point, sight line at exactly 30 deg) over a steel test surface with a small round pit. Reveals follow vt1-1-3 narration: eye-to-surface dimension (<= 600 mm / 24 in.), line-of-sight draw-on to the pit, amber detection ping on the pit, >= 30 deg angle arc at the surface, then the translucent allowed-eye-zone wedge (sight line up to the perpendicular, capped at the 600 mm radius) with EYE ANYWHERE IN THIS ZONE.
